name: portfolio-agents-correct
behaviors: A1-portfolio/AGENTS.md is the unique source (identical elsewhere = regression)
All Engine repos must have repo-specific AGENTS.md
All Application repos must have repo-specific AGENTS.md
All Reference repos (autoresearch-sboss) must have repo-specific AGENTS.md
Mirror repos (A1-Platform-MAX, A1-SMB-*) are exempt (read-only clones)
Tooling repos (a1-cross-link-sweep) must also have repo-specific AGENTS.md
rationale: AGENTS.md regression = lost charter (TDD, sovereignty, contract). Three such regressions already happened in 2026-06-22 (A1-AI-Core, sovereign, autoresearch-sboss). Lane prevents future regressions.
